## Summary

<!-- 1-2 sentences describing the change. -->

## Type

<!-- Conventional Commit type. -->

- [ ] feat — new feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] docs — documentation only
- [ ] refactor — neither feature nor fix
- [ ] perf — performance improvement
- [ ] test — adding/fixing tests
- [ ] build / ci / chore — tooling

## Linked issues

<!-- Closes #123, Refs #456 -->

## Test plan

- [ ] `vendor/bin/phpunit` passes locally
- [ ] `mago format --check && mago lint && mago analyze` passes locally
- [ ] Coverage not reduced (check `build/coverage/`)
- [ ] New public API has a doc block + `@example`
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md `[Unreleased]` updated (if user-visible)
